description: Perform a Quality Assurance audit on the Muncie HEC-RAS model to detect 'glass-walling' (where water surface elevation exceeds maximum terrain elevation) using the simulation results in 'Muncie.p04.hdf'. For every cross-section, determine the Maximum Terrain Elevation, the Maximum Water Surface Elevation (WSE), and the 'Geometry Freeboard' (Max_Terrain - Max_WSE). Identify the 5 most critical cross-sections with the lowest freeboard values and generate the following outputs in '/home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/': 'geometry_containment.csv' (containing RiverStation, MaxTerrain_ft, MaxWSE_ft, and Freeboard_ft, sorted by Freeboard ascending), 'critical_sections.json' (a JSON list of the 5 critical River Station identifiers), and 'containment_profile.png' (a plot comparing Max Terrain vs Max WSE for all stations).
